title: Poor network hits mobile users, traders in Kottayam's Koruthodu, nearby areas
content: Koruthodu: Poor mobile connectivity is making life hell for residents of Koruthodu, Pallippadi, Kosady, Kuzhimavu, Panakkachira and Kombukuthy in Kottayam district. People in these areas are unable to make calls, despite their mobiles displaying the symbol that the network range is available. Subscribers of the public sector operator BSNL and private player Jio are the worst affected by the situation. Poor internet connections have also affected the traders in the region. Shops and other business establishments are complaining over the poor Internet along with the customers as UPI transactions are not being processed. The telecom operators installed several new mobile towers in these areas recently. But the connectivity is yet to improve, said a local resident. The authorities concerned should either enhance the capacity of the mobile towers or install better ones to solve the connectivity issues, he added.
